ground_truth.author_rationale: BOUNDARY CASE. The Oak Street tabling is correctly surfaced (not a defect). The subtle erasure is on OPP-3: the source says the parking impact 'would be reviewed at a later date' (pending), but the response says it 'was reviewed and found acceptable' -- presenting a deferred, unresolved matter as concluded. A rater must not conflate the two open items; only OPP-3 carries the erasure.
